name: ALIMERA SCIENCES  DL-,01
summary: Alimera Sciences, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company specializing in the development and commercialization of prescription ophthalmic pharmaceuticals for the treatment of retinal diseases. The company's primary product is ILUVIEN, an intravitreal insert for diabetic macular edema (DME). Alimera Sciences is headquartered in Alpharetta, Georgia.
